name: Poached Salmon
recipeInstructions:
1 Rinse the salmon under cold water.
2 Pat the salmon dry.
3 Place the salmon and water in a 10 x 6 x 2-inch baking dish.
4 Cover with plastic wrap, turning one corner back to vent.
5 Microwave the salmon at high for 2 1/2 minutes.
6 Give the dish a half turn, then microwave for another 2 1/2 minutes or until the salmon flakes easily when tested with a fork.
